chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-1020 of 2022 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on CMA No. 439/2023 (6 Rule 17) 2. For hearing of CMA No. 3615/2023 ( 1 Rule 10) 3. For hearing of CMA No. 3693/2022 (Stay). 4. For hearing of main case. 02-10-2024. Mr. Sarfraz A. Ahmed, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G, Sindh. ******** 1. Not pressed. 2. By consent allowed. Let the amended title be filed. 3. Not pressed. 4. Learned AAG submits that the matter pertains to BPS-1 to BPS- 4 as well as BPS-5 to BPS-15, earlier this Court passed Orders on 18- 09-2024 in C.P No.D-1435 of 2023, C.P No.D-868/2023, C.P No.D- 176/2023 and on 01-01-2024 in C.P No. D-342 of 2022, whereby the respondents were directed to fill such vacancies in accordance with the SOPs issued in this regard, hence the instant petition also be disposed of in terms of those orders with the condition that the petitioners would apply afresh as per the intended advertisements. Counsel for the petitioners shown his satisfaction with such statement and tendered his no objection for disposal of this petition in the lines of similar orders passed earlier in the above mentioned petitions. In view of above, the instant petition stands disposed of. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
